title: GTBIF Q4 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Green Thumb Industries held its Q4 2024 earnings call, discussing the company's full-year 2024 performance and outlook. The company achieved strong revenue growth and maintained profitability despite ongoing market challenges. CEO Ben Kovler emphasized that demand for THC in America is at an all-time high. Management discussed capital allocation priorities, including share buybacks, capital expenditures for store expansion, and debt reduction. The company's debt refinancing during 2024 improved the maturity profile of its debt while reducing near-term refinancing risk. Management acknowledged continued pricing pressure in various markets and the need to focus on operational efficiency and brand differentiation. The company's CPG business showed particular strength, with growth rates exceeding retail segment growth. Management outlined plans for continued store expansion and investment in new markets. The company's strong balance sheet positions it to pursue both organic growth and potential acquisition opportunities.
